middle-tn-irish.name: Middle Tennessee Irish Music and Dance Session
middle-tn-irish.organizer: Middle Tennessee Irish Music and Dance
middle-tn-irish.description: Irish traditional music session hosted by Middle Tennessee Irish Music and Dance in Donelson.

quinns-irish.name: Irish Session at Quinn's
quinns-irish.description: Weekly Irish traditional music session at Quinn's Neighbourhood Pub in Franklin. All levels and instruments welcome — come listen or join in.

uncle-lennys-irish.name: Irish Trad Session at Uncle Lenny's
uncle-lennys-irish.description: Irish traditional music session at Uncle Lenny's Country Café in Fairview. 3rd Saturdays starting at 5pm.

browns-diner-oldtime.name: Open Irish Session at Browns Diner
browns-diner-oldtime.description: Open Irish traditional music session at Brown's Diner in Nashville. 3rd Sundays, noon to 2pm.

clarksville-irish.name: Traditional Irish Music Session with Patrick D'Arcy & Friends
clarksville-irish.venue: The Star Spangled Brewing Co. Taproom 2
clarksville-irish.description: An open Irish traditional session led by Patrick D'Arcy (Dublin, Ireland) on uilleann pipes, with friends. At The Star Spangled Brewing Co. Taproom 2 in Clarksville.
